items.exclusion_rule: requires reachability, production-context classification, non-mock classification, template-specific evidence, dynamic negative control, and impact proof before confirmed
items.evidence_requirement: code/source span + route or entrypoint + auth/tenant context + artifact hash; example/test/mock must be marked non-production
items.dynamic_validation_requirement: non-destructive local validation or explicit safe-boundary blocked state; scanner-only never confirms
items.impact_proof_requirement: show authorization/data/control boundary effect, not just existence of sink/parameter/status code
items.downgrade_policy: candidate -> needs_human_review or rejected when exclusion rule is triggered
items.report_marking_rule: report must label as candidate/rejected, not confirmed/high, when exclusion applies
items.quality_gate: QG-FP-FP01: hard-block confirmed unless exclusion checks are passed
